description: Convenient Location and Modern Amenities Located in Kailua, this newly renovated 1-bedroom apartment offers a comfortable stay with air conditioning, a kitchenette, and a private patio. The property provides guests with on-site private parking and complimentary WiFi, just 1.7 km from the famous Kailua Beach. Enjoy garden views from the terrace, a flat-screen TV, and a well-equipped kitchenette, making it a perfect choice for your stay in O'ahu. Relaxing Outdoor Spaces and Nearby Attractions With an outdoor dining area and easy access to Foster Botanical Garden and Honolulu Museum of Art, guests can unwind and explore the local attractions easily.
